title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to OpsPal's Salesforce automation reliability and Windows compatibility. We've made Salesforce data discovery more accurate, especially for revenue field detection and sales process analysis, while fixing several workflow issues that could cause automation failures. Windows users now get a much smoother setup experience with native installation support.

entries.headline: Release notes now generate automatically
details: You'll see more frequent and detailed updates about platform improvements
Release notes update automatically whenever we make changes

entries.headline: Salesforce workflow restrictions work more reliably
details: Fixed issues where legitimate Salesforce operations were blocked unnecessarily
Added override options for special cases when needed

entries.headline: Quick Salesforce record lookups run faster
details: Simple record verification queries now skip extra processing steps
Single record lookups and small result queries complete more quickly

entries.headline: Windows setup now installs all required tools automatically
details: Setup script now installs Claude Code and Node.js for you
No more manual installation steps for Windows users

entries.headline: Better error reporting when Salesforce connections fail
details: You now get clearer messages when org authentication issues occur
Connection problems are detected and reported more quickly

entries.headline: Windows installation script works with one-line setup command
details: Fixed compatibility issues when running the installation command directly
Setup process is more reliable on different Windows configurations

entries.headline: Revenue analysis results save more context for future reference
Custom templates and branding stay intact through updates
details: Your customized templates and brand elements won't be overwritten during platform updates
Custom resources are stored separately and merged automatically

entries.headline: RevOps assessments now detect your org's revenue fields automatically
details: Assessments automatically find your custom revenue, ARR, and contract value fields
Sales process analysis adapts to your org's specific opportunity stages
No more manual configuration of revenue field names

entries.headline: Windows setup prefers Git Bash over other command line options
Setup process now installs all required dependencies automatically
Windows users can now set up OpsPal with PowerShell
Setup process is more user-friendly and reliable
New tools prevent common Salesforce deployment mistakes
details: Validates picklist and record type configurations before deployment
Checks field history tracking limits to prevent failures
Merges duplicate value settings automatically

entries.headline: Added automatic scanning to prevent accidental credential commits
Enhanced security scanning in development workflow
Removed embedded credentials from platform code
Installation script now downloads from correct location
Salesforce Flow validation now handles complex logic correctly
details: Fixed issues with Flow decision logic analysis
Flow field reference validation works more accurately
Reduced false positives in Flow validation checks
